commands.review_summary:
The branch JSON-round-trips normalized Discord legacy thread-binding migration records before plugin-state import and tightens the migration regression test to strict equality.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests 0. Total +3 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, though not live-reproduced here. Current main can return enumerable undefined optional fields from a legacy Discord thread binding, and plugin-state register rejects non-JSON values before writing.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer upgrade proof, not a narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to make.

target.title: fix(discord): clean migrated thread binding state
target.body:
## Summary

- Clean Discord legacy thread-binding records before importing them into plugin state.
- Prevent omitted optional fields from being imported as enumerable `undefined` values.
- Tighten the migration regression test so JSON-unsafe undefined fields fail.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/model-picker-preferences-migrations.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Discord legacy thread-binding migration can fail during gateway/doctor startup with `PluginStateStoreError` when normalized records contain enumerable optional fields set to `undefined`.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on branch `fix/discord-thread-bindings-migration-json`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/model-picker-preferences-migrations.test.ts && git diff --check`

Evidence after fix: The focused Discord migration test passes and the strict assertion confirms migrated records omit undefined optional fields.

Observed result after fix: Migrated Discord thread-binding entries are JSON-clean before `store.register()` receives them.

What was not tested: Full repository check suite and live gateway restart.
target.author: syu8384
